gui-string.comment: Double-quoted gui value with datafunction support: text = "[Character.GetName]". Declared before the core source.paradox include so its plain string rule does not swallow the [ ... ] interior.
gui-string.name: string.quoted.double.paradox

gui-keyword.comment: Structural declarations: template X { }, type X = base { }, types Group { }, block/blockoverride "name" { }
gui-keyword.name: keyword.control.gui.paradox

gui-state-name.comment: Engine state names (_show, _hide, _mouse_enter, …) used as state name = / start = / trigger targets
gui-state-name.name: constant.language.state.paradox

gui-enum.comment: Fixed gui enum vocabulary (case-insensitive, matching the engine): anchors, layout policies, blend modes, sprite types, orientations. Guarded against key position.
gui-enum.name: constant.language.gui.paradox
